generic_name: Yogurt su frutta bio magro da latte fieno STG - 150g - pera/zenzero
generic_name_de: Joghurt auf Frucht Bio mager aus Heumilch g.t.S. - 150g - Birne/Ingwer
generic_name_en: Skimmed milk Yogurt on fruit from organic haymilk TSG - 150g - pear/ginger
generic_name_it: Yogurt su frutta bio magro da latte fieno STG - 150g - pera/zenzero
ingredients_text: Yogurt magro 80% (latte* scremato pastorizzato, fermenti lattici vivi), preparato alla pera e zenzero 20% (pere* 9% sul totale, zucchero*, amidio*, pectina, succo di limone concentratro*, estratto di zenzero* 0,3% sul totale). Senza glutine. *da agricoltura biologica.
ingredients_text_de: Magerjoghurt* 80%, Birne-Ingwerzubereitung 20% (Birnen* 9%, Zucker*, Stärke*, Pektin, Zitronensaftkonzentrat*; Ingwer Extrakt 0,3%). Glutenfrei. *aus biologischer Landwirtschaft.
ingredients_text_en: Skimmed milk* yogurt 80%,( pasteurized skimmed milk*, live active cultures) pear - ginger praparetion 20% (pear* 9%, sugar*, starch*, pectin, lemon juice concentrate*, ginger extract 0,3%). Gluten free *organic.
